title: for over Range
instruction: Use a for loop over the range 1..=5 to print the numbers 1 through 5, each on its own line.

title: while Loop
instruction: Use a while loop to count down from 3 to 1, printing each number, then print "Liftoff!" after the loop.
hint: while n > 0 { println!("{}", n); n -= 1; } then println!("Liftoff!");

title: for over Slice
instruction: Loop over the array `let fruits = ["apple", "banana", "cherry"]` and print each fruit on its own line.

title: break and continue
instruction: Loop from 1 to 6. Use continue to skip even numbers and break if the number exceeds 5. Print only 1, 3, and 5.
hint: if i % 2 == 0 { continue; } if i > 5 { break; }

title: Sum in a Loop
instruction: Use a for loop over 1..=10 to compute the sum and print the result.
hint: for i in 1..=10 { sum += i; } println!("{}", sum);
